nasb.text: On that day some Sadducees (who say there is no resurrection) came to Jesus and questioned Him,

esv.text: The same day Sadducees came to him, who say that there is no resurrection, and they asked him a question,

cnv.text: 撒都該人向來認為沒有復活的事。那一天，他們前來問耶穌：

ccb.text: 同一天，不相信死人会复活的撒都该人也来问耶稣，

csbs.text: 在那一天，撒都该人来到耶稣那里，他们一向说没有复活的事。他们问耶稣，
